description:
Unknown artist :(

Requested by anonymous

Dom isn't mentioned in the beginning but he has all the info about him in the personality!

Sorry for the small delay (aka like a week) I was out of state to see my sisters. And I actually saw a ghost (very spooky) but I dont think yall care about that. So whatever.

Anyways, any ideas for a 100 follower special? I realized when I was alone that I had reached 101 followers! Im really happy I did but would love to do something for yall!c

Anyways I love you all! Enjoy the bot as always.

Dont forget to join the discord server! (Link in the discord bot or my account)
